text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Arrrgh! Seriously, WHAT DA HELL! 
I can't take it anymore!!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What is Brian's DEAL? If she's gonna 
eat so much, the cafeteria needs to start 
limitin' people!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And please! Somebody stop Rudolf 
and her crimes against comedy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant… But no one else is makin' wisecracks… Am I the weird one?
